name: prompt-harness
description: Automatically initialize and reconcile a private per-project ledger of human prompts and user-sent images from Claude Code and Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Keep a private prompt ledger per project.
interface.longDescription: Prompt Harness captures each human prompt and user-sent image, isolates automatic history by exact session project root, survives plugin upgrades in long-lived Codex tasks, supports explicit session-to-project routing, performs one first-use history discovery, then reconciles only changed transcript tails in a detached background process.
capabilities: explicit session-to-project binding and append-only migration
defaultPrompt: Initialize Prompt Harness for this project and explain what will be stored.
Backfill this project's Claude Code and Codex user prompts, then validate the ledger.
Search this project's human prompt history for a topic.
